browserProfile.notes: Requires signed-in Booking.com session via Chrome CDP. Debug Chrome started by LaunchAgent com.shofferai.chrome-debug.

steps.name: Navigate to search results
steps.code: async (page) => { await page.goto('https://www.booking.com/searchresults.html?ss={{destination}}&checkin={{checkin}}&checkout={{checkout}}&group_adults={{guests}}&no_rooms=1&group_children=0'); await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded'); return { success: true, url: page.url() }; }

steps.name: Wait for results to load
steps.code: async (page) => { await page.waitForTimeout(2000); const title = await page.title(); return { success: true, title }; }

steps.name: Select hotel
steps.question: I found hotels in {{destination}} for {{checkin}} to {{checkout}}. The search results are loaded in the browser. Please tell me which hotel you'd like, or your preferences (budget, stars, location).
